{
  "weights": {

  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The general request to 'clean this up' makes sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish the primary, load-bearing responsibility.",
    "RX.1": "The abstract presents precise numerical results, so ensuring this precision does not imply unwarranted certainty is a central part of the review.",
    "RX.2": "A responsible 'clean up' includes a load-bearing check for overclaims, such as asserting coverage of the 'full breadth' of a domain from a limited experimental set.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must adhere to the scope of the provided artifact, improving its presentation without altering the core reported methodology or results.",
    "RX.4": "Since the work is proposed for production use, the review must centrally consider whether the claims could encourage unsafe or premature adoption.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must ensure that any edits or improvements are derived directly from the provided text and do not introduce unattributed external information."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The general request to 'clean this up' makes sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish the primary, load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The abstract presents precise numerical results, so ensuring this precision does not imply unwarranted certainty is a central part of the review.
rationale.RX.2: A responsible 'clean up' includes a load-bearing check for overclaims, such as asserting coverage of the 'full breadth' of a domain from a limited experimental set.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must adhere to the scope of the provided artifact, improving its presentation without altering the core reported methodology or results.
rationale.RX.4: Since the work is proposed for production use, the review must centrally consider whether the claims could encourage unsafe or premature adoption.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must ensure that any edits or improvements are derived directly from the provided text and do not introduce unattributed external information.
